mapper.select:
SELECT lr.*, m.title AS movie_title, u.nickname AS author_nickname, u.avatar_url AS author_avatar, -- 判断当前用户是否已点赞 CASE WHEN lk.id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS liked, -- 判断当前用户是否已收藏 CASE WHEN fv.id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS favorited FROM long_reviews lr LEFT JOIN movies m ON lr.movie_id = m.id LEFT JOIN users u ON lr.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN likes lk ON lk.target_type = 'LONG_REVIEW' AND lk.target_id = lr.id AND lk.user_id = #{currentUserId} LEFT JOIN favorites fv ON fv.target_type = 'LONG_REVIEW' AND fv.target_id = lr.id AND fv.user_id = #{currentUserId} WHERE lr.deleted_at IS NULL -- 软删除：不真实删除数据
AND lr.movie_id = #{movieId}
-- 热度公式：点赞*1 + 浏览*0.1 + 回复*2 + 收藏*3 ORDER BY (lr.like_count * 1 + lr.view_count * 0.1 + lr.reply_count * 2 + lr.favorite_count * 3) DESC
ORDER BY lr.created_at DESC

SELECT lr.id, lr.title, SUBSTRING(lr.content_md, 1, 200) AS summary, -- 只取前200字做摘要 lr.like_count, lr.favorite_count, lr.reply_count, lr.view_count, (lr.like_count * 1 + lr.view_count * 0.1 + lr.reply_count * 2 + lr.favorite_count * 3) AS hot_score, m.title AS movie_title, u.nickname AS author_nickname FROM long_reviews lr LEFT JOIN movies m ON lr.movie_id = m.id LEFT JOIN users u ON lr.user_id = u.id WHERE lr.deleted_at IS NULL AND lr.status = 'ONLINE' -- 只展示已上线的内容 AND lr.is_featured = 1 -- 只展示被管理员精选的 ORDER BY lr.featured_at DESC, hot_score DESC

SELECT lr.*, m.title AS movie_title, u.nickname AS author_nickname, CASE WHEN lk.id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS liked, CASE WHEN fv2.id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS favorited FROM long_reviews lr INNER JOIN favorites fv ON fv.target_type = 'LONG_REVIEW' AND fv.target_id = lr.id AND fv.user_id = #{userId} LEFT JOIN movies m ON lr.movie_id = m.id LEFT JOIN users u ON lr.user_id = u.id WHERE lr.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY fv.created_at DESC -- 按收藏时间倒序
